content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A) can be repurposed to prioritize which new active learning experiences an agent stores in its long-term memory, creating a self-organizing memory system that only retains high-impact, uncertainty-reducing data that will improve future task performance. This removes the need for manual memory pruning rules in state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agents.
